sql_array: CREATE TABLE settings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, setting_name VARCHAR, setting_value VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE dates (event_date DATE, event_name VARCHAR);
SELECT event_name, event_date - INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settings) DAY AS adjusted_date FROM dates WHERE adjusted_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT current_setting('access_mode') AS access_mode, event_date, event_date - INTERVAL (SELECT value::INT FROM settings WHERE setting_name = 'max_connections') DAY AS released_date FROM dates;

SELECT event_name, adjusted_date FROM (SELECT event_name, event_date - INTERVAL (d.days) DAY AS adjusted_date FROM dates, (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4)) AS d(days)) AS subquery WHERE adjusted_date IS NOT NULL AND adjusted_date < DATE '2021-12-31';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT event_name, event_date - INTERVAL (current_setting('max_connections')::INT) DAY AS adjusted_date FROM dates) AS temp WHERE adjusted_date IS NOT NULL;

SELECT event_name, event_date, current_setting('timezone') AS current_time_zone FROM dates WHERE event_date - INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settings) DAY >= DATE '2019-01-01' ORDER BY event_date DESC;
